mapper.sql: r.id, r.reservation_number, r.property_id, p.property_name, r.tower_id, tw.tower_name, r.unit_id, u.unit_code, u.unit_name, r.customer_id, c.customer_name, r.reservation_status, r.workflow_status, r.payment_status, CAST(r.reservation_date AS VARCHAR) AS reservation_date, CAST(r.expiry_date AS VARCHAR) AS expiry_date, r.quoted_rent, r.currency, r.deposit_amount, r.created_by, CAST(r.created_date AS VARCHAR) AS created_date, r.converted_lease_id, l.lease_number AS converted_lease_number, r.notes
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reservation r INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = r.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = r.tower_id INNER JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = r.unit_id INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = r.customer_id LEFT JOIN pm_lease l ON l.id = r.converted_lease_id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT FROM reservation r INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = r.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = r.tower_id INNER JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = r.unit_id INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = r.customer_id LEFT JOIN pm_lease l ON l.id = r.converted_lease_id WHERE r.reservation_number = #{reservationNumber} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET reservation_number = #{request.reservationNumber}, property_id = #{request.propertyId}, tower_id = #{request.towerId}, unit_id = #{request.unitId}, customer_id = #{request.customerId}, reservation_status = #{request.reservationStatus}, workflow_status = #{request.workflowStatus}, payment_status = #{request.paymentStatus}, reservation_date = #{request.reservationDate}, expiry_date = #{request.expiryDate}, quoted_rent = #{request.quotedRent}, currency = #{request.currency}, deposit_amount = #{request.depositAmount}, created_by = #{request.createdBy}, notes = #{request.notes}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

UPDATE reservation SET reservation_status = #{request.reservationStatus}, workflow_status = #{request.workflowStatus}, payment_status = #{request.paymentStatus}, notes = COALESCE(#{request.notes}, notes), updated_by = #{request.updatedBy}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE reservation SET reservation_status = 'CONVERTED', workflow_status = 'APPROVED', converted_lease_id = #{leaseId}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE reservation SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
